title: zappania lappulacea
intro: Zappania lappulacea is a shrub species belonging to the family Salicaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Zappania lappulacea include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of using Zappania lappulacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Zappania lappulacea can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
